channel.title: Dokumentasi BigLedger – Related-Applets
channel.description: Recent content in Related-Applets on Dokumentasi BigLedger

item.title: Applet Berkaitan - Stock Balance
item.description:
Applet stock balance boleh mengimport Baris daripada Applet berikut:

Applet Organisation Applet Item (inv) Maintenance Applet Doc Item Maintenance Applet Sales Invoice Applet Purchase Invoice Applet Sales Return Applet Purchases Return Applet Stock Adjustment Applet Sales Credit Note Applet Sales Debit Note Applet Purchase Credit Note Applet Purchase Debit Note Applet Internal Sales Goods Received Note Applet Internal Purchase Goods Received Note Applet Internal Sales Goods Issue Note Applet Internal Purchase Goods Issue Note

Maklumat dalam applet Stock balance digunakan oleh applet yang mana:

Applet Stock Availability Applet Inventory Admin Applet Sales Order Applet Packing Order Applet Delivery Order Applet Purchase Order Applet Purchase requisition Applet Quotation Applet Sales Credit Note Applet Sales Debit Note Applet Purchase Credit Note Applet Purchase Debit Note Applet Sales Return Applet Purchases Return Applet Stock Adjustment Applet Internal Sales Goods Received Note Applet Internal Purchase Goods Received Note Applet Internal Sales Goods Issue Note Applet Internal Purchase Goods Issue Note
